chunks.title: Assyrian Invasion and Delegation
chunks.reason: Sets the scene for the confrontation between Assyria and Judah.

chunks.title: Rabshakeh's Initial Taunt
chunks.reason: Rabshakeh addresses the officials with a rhetorical challenge to their trust.

chunks.title: Negotiation of Language
chunks.reason: The officials request Aramaic to spare the people, which Rabshakeh rejects.

chunks.title: Rabshakeh's Public Oratory
chunks.reason: Rabshakeh shouts the Assyrian king's ultimatum to the people on the wall.

chunks.title: Report to Hezekiah
chunks.reason: The officials return to Hezekiah with the news of the siege.
